debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
f : GlobalTheorem.E✝ n → ℝ
fc : ContDiff ℝ 2 f
x y : GlobalTheorem.E✝ n
ε : ℝ
hε : ε > 0
hdiff : failed to pretty print expression (use 'set_option pp.rawOnError true' for raw representation)
mpb : mixed_partials_bounded f x
g₀ : ℝ → GlobalTheorem.E✝ n := GlobalTheorem.interpolator✝ n x y
g : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated✝ n x y f
g' : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv✝ n x y f
g'' : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv2✝ n x y f
f_diff : Differentiable ℝ f
g₀_diff : Differentiable ℝ g₀
g_diff : Differentiable ℝ g
g'_diff : Differentiable ℝ g'
g'_cont : Continuous g'
g''_cont : Continuous g''
deriv_g_eq_g' : deriv g = g'
deriv_g'_eq_g'' : deriv g' = g''
int_g'_eq_sub : ∀ (t : ℝ), ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g' s = g t - g 0
int_g''_eq_sub : ∀ (t : ℝ), ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g'' s = g' t - g' 0
hobs : g 1 - g 0 = g' 0 + ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g'' s
bound1 : |g' 0| ≤ ε * ∑ i, |nth_partial i f x|
⊢ ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s| ≤ ↑n ^ 2 / 2 * ε ^ 2

      apply (intervalIntegral.integral_mono ht.1 (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) fun s _ => h_g'' s).trans
      simp [intervalIntegral.integral_const, ht.1]; rw [mul_comm]; gcongr; exact ht.1).trans
    simp [intervalIntegral.integral_id]; ring

have hg'' s : |g'' s| ≤ (n : ℝ) ^ 2 * ε ^ 2 := by
      unfold g'' interpolated_deriv2
      refine (abs_sum_le _ _).trans (Finset.sum_le_sum fun i _ => (abs_sum_le _ _).trans (Finset.sum_le_sum fun j _ => ?_))
      simp_rw [abs_mul, abs_sub_comm (x _)]
      exact mul_le_mul (mul_le_mul (hdiff i) (hdiff j) (abs_nonneg _) hε.le) (mpb i j _) (abs_nonneg _) (mul_nonneg hε.le hε.le)
    simp_rw [Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_fin, ← pow_two] at hg''
    have hint t (ht : 0 ≤ t) : ∫ s in 0..t, |g'' s| ≤ t * ((n : ℝ) ^ 2 * ε ^ 2) :=
      (intervalIntegral.integral_mono ht g''_cont.abs.intervalIntegrable 0 t intervalIntegrable_const fun s _ => hg'' s).trans_eq (by simp)
    refine (intervalIntegral.integral_mono (by norm_num) ?_ ?_ (fun t ht => hint t ht.1)).trans ?_
    · exact (intervalIntegral.continuous_primitive g''_cont.abs 0).continuousOn.intervalIntegrable 0 1
    · exact (continuous_id.mul continuous_const).intervalIntegrable 0 1
    · simp [intervalIntegral.integral_id]; ring

unfold g''; refine (abs_sum_le.trans <| Finset.sum_le_sum fun i _ => (abs_sum_le.trans <| Finset.sum_le_sum fun j _ => ?_)).trans ?_
    · rw [abs_mul, abs_mul, abs_sub_comm (y i), abs_sub_comm (y j)]
      exact mul_le_mul (mul_le_mul (hdiff i) (hdiff j) (abs_nonneg _) hε.le) (mpb i j _) (abs_nonneg _) (mul_nonneg hε.le hε.le)
    · simp [Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_univ, sq, mul_assoc]
  apply (intervalIntegral.integral_mono zero_le_one (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) fun t ht =>
    intervalIntegral.integral_mono (ht.1.le) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) fun s hs => hg'' s).trans
  simp [intervalIntegral.integral_const, intervalIntegral.integral_id, intervalIntegral.integral_mul_const]
  ring

have h_g'' (s : ℝ) : |g'' s| ≤ (n : ℝ) ^ 2 * ε ^ 2 := by
      rw [g'']; apply (abs_sum_le _ _).trans
      simp_rw [abs_sum_le, abs_mul, abs_mul]
      apply (Finset.sum_le_sum fun i _ => Finset.sum_le_sum fun j _ => ?_).trans
      · simp_rw [Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_fin, nsmul_eq_mul]; ring
      · simp_rw [abs_sub_comm]; rw [← sq]
        exact (mul_le_mul (mul_le_mul (hdiff i) (hdiff j) (abs_nonneg _) hε.le) (mpb i j _) (abs_nonneg _) (mul_nonneg hε.le hε.le)).trans (by simp)
    apply le_trans (intervalIntegral.integral_mono_on zero_le_one (Continuous.intervalIntegrable (Continuous.intervalIntegral (Continuous.abs g''_cont) 0) 0 1) (Continuous.intervalIntegrable (by fun_prop) 0 1) (fun t ht => intervalIntegral.integral_le_integral_const ht.1 (fun s _ => h_g'' s)))
    rw [intervalIntegral.integral_mul_const, intervalIntegral.integral_id]; simp; ring

have hg'' s : |g'' s| ≤ n ^ 2 * ε ^ 2 := mpb.g''_bound hdiff s
    calc ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s|
      _ ≤ ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, t * (n ^ 2 * ε ^ 2) :=
        intervalIntegral.integral_mono (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) fun t _ =>
          intervalIntegral.integral_le_const _ (fun s _ => hg'' s)
      _ = ↑n ^ 2 / 2 * ε ^ 2 := by simp [intervalIntegral.integral_id]; ring

simpa [intervalIntegral.integral_const] using intervalIntegral.integral_mono_on ht (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) (λ s _ => h_g'' s)
  apply (intervalIntegral.integral_mono_on (by norm_num) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) (λ t ht => h_int_g'' t ht.1)).trans
  simp [intervalIntegral.integral_id]
  ring

have h_g''_bound s : |g'' s| ≤ n ^ 2 * ε ^ 2 := by
      unfold g''; refine (abs_sum_le _).trans ?_
      simp_rw [abs_sum_le, abs_mul, abs_sub_comm]
      refine (Finset.sum_le_sum fun i _ => Finset.sum_le_sum fun j _ => ?_).trans ?_
      · exact mul_le_mul (mul_le_mul (hdiff i) (hdiff j) (abs_nonneg _) hε.le) (mpb i j _) (abs_nonneg _) (mul_nonneg (abs_nonneg _) (abs_nonneg _))
      · simp [Finset.sum_const]; ring
    calc ∫ t in 0..1, ∫ s in 0..t, |g'' s|
      _ ≤ ∫ t in 0..1, ∫ s in 0..t, (n : ℝ) ^ 2 * ε ^ 2 :=
        intervalIntegral.integral_mono zero_le_one (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) (fun t ht =>
          intervalIntegral.integral_mono ht.1 (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) (fun s _ => h_g''_bound s))
      _ = n ^ 2 / 2 * ε ^ 2 := by
        simp [intervalIntegral.integral_const, intervalIntegral.integral_id]; ring
